reason_for_decision: The revised article clears the pass threshold with stronger function-placement logic, better hybrid framing, and clearer latency-versus-governance trade-offs.
strengths: The article now separates time-critical and management-critical functions, which improves architectural clarity.
The hybrid-model explanation is concrete enough to guide real deployment decisions.
The piece avoids ideology and keeps the comparison tied to degraded-network behavior and operational need.
summary_assessment: This version passes because it treats edge and cloud as function-placement choices rather than as infrastructure slogans. It now works as a practical surveillance-architecture article.
